prestazioni: Honda K20C1 (2.0L turbocharged inline-4) forced induction upgrade via Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger with billet compressor wheel, 0.82 A/R turbine housing, and TiAL MV-R 44mm external wastegate, paired with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe and GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for 32 psi peak pressure targeting 450 whp on E85 fuel

Full Motec M150 ECU standalone engine management with custom CAN bus integration for the Atom 4R’s paddle-shift gearbox, including launch control, flat-foot shifting, and individual cylinder fuel trimming with Bosch Motorsport 1000cc injectors and a Radium Engineering dual-catch can system for crankcase ventilation

Ohlins TTX25 MkII coilover suspension with 2-way adjustable compression and rebound damping, custom valving for the Atom 4R’s tubular spaceframe, and spherical bearing top mounts, paired with AP Racing CP6640-2600 4-piston front calipers, 280mm floating rotors, and Ferodo DS2500 brake pads for track endurance
estetica: Custom carbon fiber widebody kit by Caterham Composites, extending the front and rear fenders by 50mm to accommodate 18x10.5 ET25 front and 18x12 ET35 rear BBS FI-R wheels with 245/35 and 305/30 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires, respectively

Aerodynamic package featuring a full-length Gurney flap on the rear diffuser, a 3D-printed titanium front splitter with adjustable dive planes, and a removable carbon fiber rear wing with dual-element design and 15mm adjustable ride height via integrated stanchions

Bespoke interior trim by Sparco including a carbon fiber dash panel with integrated AIM MXS Strada 1.2 data logger, Alcantara-wrapped MOMO Prototipo steering wheel with quick-release hub, and custom-fitted Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses with FIA homologation
